occurrence_sentence: The partnership includes team members from Riverlane, Rigetti Computing and the US Department of Energy's Oak Ridge National Laboratory (ORNL).

interaction_phrase: participation in a project led by the US Department of Energy's Oak
occurrence_sentence: Riverlane and Rigetti Computing (Nasdaq: RGTI) announced their participation in a project led by the US Department of Energy's Oak Ridge National Laboratory (ORNL) to explore the challenges of integrating a quantum computer with a large-scale, supercomputing centre.

occurrence_sentence: Riverlane, Rigetti and Oak Ridge National Laboratory (ORNL) will publish the results of the project, sharing the key learnings about interoperability issues and performance from interfacing early quantum devices with HPC-infrastructure.
